title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.680 - Deposit of registration moneys
text:
351.680.  Deposit of registration moneys. — The moneys arising from registration fees under this law shall be deposited in the state treasury to the credit of the ordinary revenue fund.
(RSMo 1939 § 5107, A.L. 1943 p. 410 § 130, A. 1949 H.B. 2079) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4635; 1919 § 9829
